Description:
Neck pulling, stiffness, or involuntary head movement? It may be more than tension. 💭

Cervical dystonia is a neurological movement disorder that causes painful neck spasms and abnormal head posture — and many people go years without answers.

This patient’s story is proof: relief is possible.💚

Considering Botox for migraines but still have questions? 

You’re not alone — and getting the right information matters. Botox is an FDA-approved treatment for chronic migraine and can help reduce headache frequency, severity, and disruption to daily life.

At The Headache Lab, we specialize in medical migraine and headache care — not cosmetic treatments. Every treatment plan is personalized based on your symptoms, history, and goals. 💜

Headaches aren’t something you’re supposed to just live with.🤕

If your headaches happen often, interfere with daily life, keep coming back, or don’t respond to over-the-counter medications, they may actually be migraines.

Migraines are a neurologic condition, not “just stress” or something you have to push through — and effective medical treatment options are available.

Migraines are not “just stress.”

They’re a neurological disorder involving changes in brain signaling and nerve activation — often influenced by genetics. 🤯

Triggers like stress, hormones, sleep changes, weather, and screen time can spark an attack… but they aren’t the root cause.

If migraines happen 15+ days per month, it’s called chronic migraine — and it is treatable.

You don’t have to live with constant migraines.
